rationale: The cited paper is a plausible theory/mechanism source for this pair: it studies stage-contingent effects of perceived progress velocity in loyalty/goal-reward settings, which overlaps with the citing paper’s core constructs of reward proximity/attainment and engagement dynamics in a gamified app. Although we only have one matched DOI reference and no in-text citation context, the conceptual overlap is strong enough that this should not be dropped as an obvious mention-only citation.
